title: Introduction to Artificial Intelligence with Brian Yu - Chapter 6 - Generating (live, unedited)
summary: CS50 is Harvard University's introductory computer science course taught by David J. Malan. Chapter 6 covers generative AI topics and is available live and unedited on YouTube. The course is offered through multiple channels including edX, Harvard Extension School, Harvard Summer School, and OpenCourseWare.
writeup: This CS50 chapter, taught by Brian Yu and posted live and unedited, covers generative AI as part of Harvard's introductory computer science course. The session sits within a broader curriculum that also touches on AI economics. CS50 itself, led by David J. Malan, is distributed across edX, Harvard Extension School, Harvard Summer School, and OpenCourseWare, with this material available on YouTube.
